name: BigShots Golf Springfield
about: BigShots Golf Springfield is a hybrid entertainment venue combining a virtual golf driving range with a sports bar and full restaurant. It features 56 climate-controlled tee boxes equipped with simulator technology, alongside a 6-hole putting course and various yard games. The venue offers a full scratch kitchen and cocktail bar, with over 100 TVs for viewing sporting events. It operates daily with variable hours and hosts a variety of events, from corporate gatherings to birthday parties and sports viewing parties. The facility is owned and operated by O'Reilly Hospitality Management, LLC.
why_golfers_like_it: 56 tee boxes with simulator technology available for up to 6 people per bay
Full restaurant and bar service available directly at the tee boxes
Dedicated 6-hole putting course for short game practice
Combination of virtual golf, yard games, and sports viewing in one location

food_and_drink.notes: Full scratch kitchen with a menu featuring items like Stuffed Cheddar-Bacon Tots, Big Pig pizza, Cali chicken sandwich, PB & Jam burger, and more. Food can be ordered at the tee box or from the bar.
Full bar serving handcrafted cocktails, frozen margaritas, and other beverages. Sports bar atmosphere with game-day specials.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, golf clubs and good times come at no extra cost. The venue provides all necessary equipment for the simulator and putting course.

faq.question: Can I bring in my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue operates a full scratch kitchen and bar where you can order food and cocktails directly to your tee box.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Pricing is based on hourly rates for the tee boxes, not per hole. Each box can accommodate up to 6 people and costs between $18-$52 per hour depending on the time of day and day of the week.

faq.question: Is BigShots Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, BigShots Golf is family-friendly and offers activities for all ages, including mini golf, yard games, and a dedicated putting course, making it suitable for kids.
